title: Lab 06: Shared Setgid Directory
description: Build a collaborative directory that uses both setgid and sticky semantics.

tasks: On client, create the group analystsx and the directory /shared/analysts with owner root, group analystsx, and access limited to root and members of analystsx.
On client, configure /shared/analysts so new files inherit the analystsx group and only the file owner, the directory owner, or root can remove entries from it.
hints: A collaborative drop directory often needs both setgid and sticky semantics.
Set the sticky bit with +t, not g+t.
checks: getent group analystsx >/dev/null && stat -c '%F %U:%G' /shared/analysts | grep -qx 'directory root:analystsx'
solution_outline: Create the group and directory tree.
Apply the base mode, then add setgid and sticky semantics.
task_titles: Enable setgid and sticky behavior on the directory
